strengths: Demonstrated proper needle loading and driving technique through the Penrose drain
Successfully completed multiple extracorporeal knot throws with good hand coordination
Maintained consistent camera positioning throughout most of the procedure
weaknesses: Failed to complete the task within the time limit, missing the final suture cutting phase
Spent excessive time on knot tying relative to the overall task requirements
Did not efficiently transition between phases, leading to time management issues

drills.name: Timed suture cutting drill
drills.description: Practice the complete task sequence with emphasis on cutting both suture ends inside the trainer within a 6-minute time limit.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the task within the time limit.

drills.name: Knot-pusher sequencing drill
drills.description: Practice 10 three-throw extracorporeal sequences with deliberate pusher advancement, focusing on efficiency rather than perfection.
drills.targets_weakness: Spent excessive time on knot tying relative to task requirements.

drills.name: Phase transition timing drill
drills.description: Break the task into timed segments: 2 minutes for needle passes, 3 minutes for knot tying, 1 minute for cutting.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not efficiently transition between phases.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your solid technical skills into faster execution. Your knot tying technique is sound, but you need to balance precision with speed to complete the task within the time limit.
